intro:
I couldn't find any information on a plant called "Ozotrix helvetica." However, I found information on the plant "Ozothamnus helvetius" which is also known as "White everlasting daisy" or "Ozotria helvetica." 

Ozothamnus helvetius is a flowering plant in the daisy family, native to Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, providing relief from colds, fever, and other respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Ozothamnus helvetius include flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Ozothamnus helvetius include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to alleviate respiratory problems and promote overall well-being.
